subject: FW: For jeffrey
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: laetitia.simon2@gmail.com [mailto:laetitia.simon2@gmail.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, November 14, 2007 2:31 PM
To: Lesley Groff; Lesley Groff
Subject: For jeffrey

Hello lesley,
Could you pass this note to jeffrey please? 
Thanks take care

Hi jeffrey,
Following our conversation just wanted to say that i'm really sorry for everything that is happening to you...
And i am even more sorry to insist on helping me but i have no issues i'm so deep in trouble that you are probably my last hope on getting my life back!! I owe so much money to banks and government that even if i get 2 jobs i won't be abble to live out of my salaries and pay my bills... if i can only give back thé 6000 euros i would be abble to set up a monthly reimboursment to thé other credit i have and i'll be abble to have a little bit of money left each months to live... I know your situation is complicated and i wish i didn't'have to bother you with my stupid problems... but i have no one else around me that could help and i'm desperate!! I'll do anything in return just let me know what i have to do.
Thanks for your attention and i hope you'll understand
Take care and please let me know if there is anything i can do to help on my side...kisses laetitia
---- Envoyé avec BlackBerry® d'Orange ----
